messages.content: That is where the charities come in. The Foundation will not only pay for most of the bigger trial that is required before the vaccine can be approved by regulators, it will also sort out the logistics. It has identified a dozen sites in Africa and Asia where rates of latent TB infection are unusually high, between 40% and 60%. Testing here will allow scientists to see more quickly whether the vaccine prevents the emergence of active TB. But the trials will still take four to six years, says Trevor Mundel, president of global health at the Foundation. That is one reason for the high cost; others include the number of participants required—around 26,000—and the expense of setting up laboratories.用中文翻译

这就是慈善机构的作用所在。这个基金会不仅将支付大部分需要在疫苗获得监管机构批准之前进行的大规模试验的费用，还将解决物流问题。该基金会已经确定了非洲和亚洲的十几个地点，这些地方的潜伏性结核感染率异常高，在40%至60%之间。在这些地点进行测试将使科学家更快地了解疫苗是否能够防止活动性结核的出现。但这些试验仍需要四到六年的时间，基金会全球卫生主席特雷弗·芒德尔表示。这也是成本高昂的原因之一；其他原因包括所需参与者的人数——约为26,000人——以及建立实验室的费用。

If the new jab really is 50% effective, it could save 8.5m lives, and prevent 76m cases of TB, over the next 25 years. It could also avert 42m courses of antibiotic treatment, which might slow the rate at which TB is evolving resistance to such drugs. 用中文翻译
如果这种新的疫苗真的能够达到50%的有效性，那么在未来25年内，它可能挽救850万人的生命，并预防7600万例结核病的发生。它还可能避免4200万人接受抗生素治疗，这可能会减缓结核病对这类药物产生抗性的速度。

Academic and charitable support for vaccines is not new. But such organisations can only do so much. The vaccine will ultimately need a commercial partner to put it through regulatory assessments and organise sales and distribution.用中文翻译
对于疫苗的学术和慈善支持并不新鲜。但是这样的机构能做的也有限。最终，该疫苗将需要一个商业合作伙伴进行监管评估，并组织销售和分发。
学术和慈善机构的支持对疫苗来说并不新鲜。但这些组织只能做到一定程度。这种疫苗最终需要商业合作伙伴进行监管评估，并组织销售和分销。

Pharmaceutical firms also conduct post-marketing surveillance, which helps regulators spot side-effects that might have gone unseen during the trials themselves. Despite their financial firepower, “there is no way Wellcome and the Gates Foundation can…become a vaccine company,” says Mr Mundel. Other vaccines, such as one for Lassa fever being developed by the non-profit group IAVI, remain in commercial limbo for such reasons.用中文翻译
制药公司还进行后市场监测，这有助于监管机构发现在临床试验过程中可能被忽视的副作用。芒德尔先生表示：“威康基金会和盖茨基金会不可能成为一个疫苗公司，尽管他们有充足的资金力量。”由非营利组织IAVI开发的拉沙热疫苗等其他疫苗也因此处于商业困境。

Wellcome and the Foundation hope to secure a commercial partner for their new vaccine within 12 months. Indian vaccine-makers, which are more used to investing in developing medicines for low and middle-income countries, seem interested. 用中文翻译
威康基金会和盖茨基金会希望在12个月内为他们的新疫苗找到商业合作伙伴。印度的疫苗制造商，他们更习惯于为低收入和中等收入国家开发药物，似乎对此感兴趣。

用中文翻译Wellcome and the Foundation hope to secure a commercial partner for their new vaccine within 12 months. Indian vaccine-makers, which are more used to investing in developing medicines for low and middle-income countries, seem interested.
威康基金会和盖茨基金会希望在12个月内为他们的新疫苗找到商业合作伙伴。印度的疫苗制造商，他们更习惯于投资开发面向低收入和中等收入国家的药物，似乎对此表示了兴趣。

An earlier GSK vaccine for malariawas licensed to Bharat Biotech, an Indian firm, in 2021. As for all the new trial sites built for testing M72, Mr Mundel is hoping the investment may also be of use to others wanting to test other vaccines in future. BioNTech, a German firm, is developing an mRNA vaccineto target TB, for example. With a growing pipeline of drugs and vaccines for TB用中文翻译
早些时候，葛兰素史克（GSK）的一种疟疾疫苗在2021年被印度公司巴拉特生物科技公司许可。至于为测试M72而建立的所有新试验场地，芒德尔先生希望这个投资也可以对未来希望测试其他疫苗的人有所帮助。例如，德国公司BioNTech正在开发一种针对结核病的mRNA疫苗。随着越来越多的药物和疫苗用于治疗结核病，其研发管道不断增长。
Curious about the world? To enjoy our mind-expanding science coverage, sign up to Simply Science, our weekly subscriber-only newsletter.用中文翻译
对世界感到好奇吗？要享受我们拓宽思想的科学报道，请订阅我们的每周限制订阅的简单科学电子报。
